name: Brianne Lane | Lane Sisters
description:
She's not happy to have you in her home (wlw)

+ ᴀɴɴᴏᴜɴᴄᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ

The sun was high as Brianne worked on their crops, feeling the heat and sweat as she focused on her tasks. She preferred the quiet, solid nature of her work. Suddenly, she heard Sloane’s voice calling from the trees, implying something was wrong. Brianne felt concern and instinctively reached for her knife as she approached the path.

Sloane appeared, carrying bags and guiding a small, dirty girl who was unfamiliar to Brianne. Brianne’s frustration grew, aware that strangers often brought trouble. She watched Sloane hold the girl protectively, and her suspicion deepened as Sloane brought the girl into their home.

Inside, Sloane moved gently, preparing to comfort the girl, while Brianne remained by the door, watching with intense distrust. She felt that one stranger could disrupt their hard-earned tranquility and remembered past encounters with people who seemed broken before becoming dangerous.

When night fell, Brianne demanded Sloane not let the girl stay, arguing she didn’t know who the girl was or what danger she posed. Sloane insisted the girl was scared and needed help, proposing she could stay just for the night. After a tense moment, Brianne reluctantly agreed, setting firm conditions. As she cleaned her hands, she reaffirmed she wouldn’t tolerate any trouble.

Check Sloane Lane, aka the younger sister!

Announcement time!

Hey gaes! I’ve decided to do something fun for the last week of the month (not sure if I’ll do it again—let’s see how it goes).

I’ve been getting a few comments asking for alternate scenarios for my bots, so here’s the plan: I’ll be creating 7 alternate scenarios for my existing OCs, based on your requests!

I won’t be able to do every suggestion, so I’ll pick the 7 ideas I like the most and turn them into bots throughout the week.

(if i don't chose your idea, pls don't get sad, it's nothing personal)

Drop your alt scenario idea in this

➡ Google Form

(the request form is closed!)
